zh.Cathedral, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Scrope於1348年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Sir Henry Scrope36歲，母親Joan32歲。他於1388年9月16日之前與Elizabeth Strathbogie結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1405年12月23日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年57歲。

zh-hans.Cathedral, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Scrope于1348年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Henry Scrope36岁，母亲Joan32岁。他于1388年9月16日之前与Elizabeth Strathbogie结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1405年12月23日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Scrope was born in 1348, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Henry Scrope, was 36 and his mother, Joan, was 32. He married Elizabeth Strathbogie before 16 September 1388. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 23 December 1405, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Scrope est né en 1348, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry Scrope, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Strathbogie avant 16 septembre 1388. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 décembre 1405, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Scrope 1348 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Scrope 36 und seine Mutter Joan 32. Er hat vor 16. September 1388 Elizabeth Strathbogie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. Dezember 1405 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Scrope è nato il nel 1348 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Henry Scrope, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Joan, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Strathbogie prima del 16 settembre 1388. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 23 dicembre 1405, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Upsall, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウプサル
ja.lifeSummary: John Scropeが1348年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Scropeは36歳，母Joanは32歳であった。1388年9月16日以前にElizabeth Strathbogieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1405年12月23日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Scrope(이)가 1348년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Scrope(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1388년 9월 16일 이전 Elizabeth Strathbogie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1405년 12월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Scrope nasceu em 1348, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry Scrope, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Strathbogie antes 16 de setembro de 1388. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de dezembro de 1405, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Scrope родился в 1348 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Scrope было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Strathbogie перед 16 сентябрь 1388 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 23 декабря 1405 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Scrope nació en 1348, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Henry Scrope, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Strathbogie antes de 16 de septiembre de 1388. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 23 de diciembre de 1405, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
